title: Ask me anything! Kaitlyn Tiffany, author of The Housewives Underground: The Untold Story of the Women Who Made the JFK Assassination Our Most Enduring Mystery
summary: Kaitlyn Tiffany's book, "The Housewives Underground," highlights three women who diligently investigated the JFK assassination, challenging the Warren Report and influencing American history.
hook_angles: Meet the 'Housewives Underground' – the unsung heroines who dared to question the official story of the JFK assassination.
How three ordinary women took on the government and changed the narrative around the JFK assassination forever.
The untold story of the women who cracked open the JFK mystery, long before the internet existed.
